text: Standing in front of this glass-walled room aglow with electric blue light, I sense a tinge of curiosity pulling me inward. The bold 'R+D' on the wall hints at innovation—a space for exploration and progress. Inside, the vibrant colors and displays give off an atmosphere of energized possibility. I feel inspired, as if on the edge of discovery, eager to unravel the ways humans and machines might connect and coexist. The sterile, clean environment contrasts sharply with the creative chaos implied by research and development, giving me a sense of anticipation and intellectual excitement.
